creator: chris@aims.com.au
text:
The bug I registered with PHP has been fixed in their repository, so this
will resolve the issue once 4.0.7 is released. FYI the modified files in the
PHP repository are ext/gd/config.m4 v1.72 and ext/gd/gd.c v1.156. I've tried
patching this myself - it builds, but configure is not doing the right thing
in setting up the defines for HAVE_GD_GIF_READ and HAVE_GD_GIF_CREATE.
I hope this is of some help.

Regards,
Chris Knight
Systems Administrator
AIMS Independent Computer Professionals
